---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Use case**
What are you trying to do? (The problem matters more than the solution.)

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine it working.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways this could be solved, if any.

**Scope check**
- [ ] This doesn't lock the project into a single LLM/embedding vendor
- [ ] This doesn't require storing unencrypted user content
